Slayin' Arena

Welcome to Slayin' Arena! Choose your hero and survive waves of monsters in an endless single-screen battle. Your hero automatically attacks enemies when in range, while you control their movement left and right. Defeat monsters to gain experience, level up, and earn coins. A traveling merchant appears periodically, offering equipment upgrades to boost your stats. Survive as long as possible and slay as many monsters as you can before your health reaches zero!

Arrow Left / Left: Move hero left | Arrow Right / Right: Move hero right | Space: Select hero class (start screen) / Interact with merchant | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause / Close shop | R: Return to start screen
